---
title: "Home"
---

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: center;"}

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.align='center', out.width='100%'}
knitr::include_graphics("images/headshot.png")
```

## Imani Allen, MPH

:::

::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: left;"}

Imani Allen is public health data analyst focused on advancing public health equity through research, storytelling, and community-driven solutions.  

See more about Imani here: (https://www.linkedin.com/in/imani-allen-a5750121b/) 

:::
